title: Chain 1/8: Monday Morning
scene: 周一早上，你刚到办公室和同事打招呼。（对话链：办公室）

turns.cn: 早上好！周末过得怎么样？
turns.en: Good morning! How was your weekend?

turns.cn: 挺好的，去看了场电影。你呢？
turns.en: It was good. I went to see a movie. How about you?

turns.cn: 在家休息，补了觉。
turns.en: I just stayed home and caught up on sleep.

turns.cn: 今天有什么会议吗？
turns.en: Do we have any meetings today?

turns.cn: 十点有个团队周会。
turns.en: There's a team stand-up at ten o'clock.

turns.cn: 好的，我准备一下材料。
turns.en: Okay, I'll get my materials ready.

title: Chain 2/8: Stand-up Meeting
scene: 十点站会轮到你发言。（对话链：办公室）

turns.cn: 张伟，你昨天进展怎么样？
turns.en: Zhang Wei, how did things go yesterday?

turns.cn: 完成了登录页改版，今天做联调。
turns.en: Finished the login page redesign. Today I'm doing integration.

turns.cn: 有阻塞吗？
turns.en: Any blockers?

turns.cn: 需要后端 API，下午和对方对齐。
turns.en: I need the back-end API. I'll sync with them this afternoon.

turns.cn: 好，有问题随时说。
turns.en: Okay. Let me know if anything comes up.

title: Chain 3/8: Ask for a Day Off
scene: 你需要请一天假，去找老板商量。（对话链：办公室）

turns.cn: 老板，您现在方便吗？我想请一天假。
turns.en: Do you have a moment? I'd like to request a day off.

turns.cn: 哪天？什么事？
turns.en: Which day? What's the reason?

turns.cn: 下周五，家里有点急事要处理。
turns.en: Next Friday. I have a family matter to take care of.

turns.cn: 那天有个项目截止，能提前完成吗？
turns.en: There's a project deadline that day. Can you finish ahead of time?

turns.cn: 可以的，我周四之前交。
turns.en: Yes, I can have it done by Thursday.

turns.cn: 好的，批准了。有事提前安排好。
turns.en: All right, it's approved. Just make sure everything is covered.

title: Chain 4/8: Conference Call
scene: 你正在参加一个国际电话会议。（对话链：办公室）

turns.cn: 你能分享一下项目进展吗？
turns.en: Could you share an update on the project?

turns.cn: 当然。目前进度正常，预计下周完成。
turns.en: Sure. We're on track and expect to finish next week.

turns.cn: 有什么困难或需要支持的吗？
turns.en: Are there any challenges or support you need?

turns.cn: 我们需要设计团队配合，能帮忙协调吗？
turns.en: We need help from the design team. Could you coordinate that?

turns.cn: 没问题，我今天联系他们。
turns.en: No problem. I'll reach out to them today.

turns.cn: 谢谢！我周五再发一份详细报告。
turns.en: Thank you! I'll send a detailed report on Friday.

title: Chain 5/8: Printer Problem
scene: 你需要打印文件，但打印机出了问题。（对话链：办公室）

turns.cn: 你好，三楼打印机卡纸了。
turns.en: Hi, the printer on the third floor is jammed.

turns.cn: 显示什么错误代码？
turns.en: What error code does it show?

turns.cn: E3，我试了重启没用。
turns.en: E3. I tried restarting it. Didn't help.

turns.cn: 我十分钟后过去，先用二楼那台。
turns.en: I'll be there in ten minutes. Use the one on the second floor for now.

turns.cn: 好的，谢谢。
turns.en: Okay. Thanks.

title: Chain 6/8: Lunch with Colleague
scene: 中午你和同事去楼下吃午饭。（对话链：办公室）

turns.cn: 去食堂还是出去吃？
turns.en: Cafeteria or eat out?

turns.cn: 出去吧，我知道一家越南粉不错。
turns.en: Let's go out. I know a good pho place.

turns.cn: 远吗？一点前要回来。
turns.en: Is it far? We need to be back before one.

turns.cn: 走路五分钟，来得及。
turns.en: Five minutes on foot. We'll make it.

turns.cn: 行，走。
turns.en: Sure, let's go.

title: Chain 7/8: Stay Late
scene: 项目赶工，你和老板沟通今晚加班。（对话链：办公室）

turns.cn: 今晚可能要加班到八点，上线窗口是今晚。
turns.en: I may need to stay until eight. The release window is tonight.

turns.cn: 需要谁支援？
turns.en: Who do you need for support?

turns.cn: 后端小李在线就行，我前端收尾。
turns.en: Just Li on back-end online. I'll wrap up the front end.

turns.cn: 好，打车报销，明天晚点到。
turns.en: Okay. Expense your ride home. Come in late tomorrow.

turns.cn: 谢谢老板。
turns.en: Thank you.

title: Chain 8/8: Wrap Up the Week
scene: 周五下班前，你和同事聊本周总结。（对话链：办公室）

turns.cn: 这周够累的，周末有什么计划？
turns.en: Busy week. Any plans for the weekend?

turns.cn: 好好睡一觉，周日去爬山。
turns.en: Catch up on sleep. Hiking on Sunday.

turns.cn: 登录页上线顺利，辛苦了。
turns.en: Login page shipped smoothly. Nice work.

turns.cn: 团队合作的好，周一见。
turns.en: Good teamwork. See you Monday.

turns.cn: 周一见，周末愉快！
turns.en: See you Monday. Have a great weekend!
